D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

One Colour, Two Faces

slide one colour onto two backgrounds and toggle the reveal to prove the twin squares are identical

A surround shifts the colour it encloses toward its own opposite. The very same square looks two different colours when its backgrounds differ.

The two centre squares are physically identical. Slide the centre colour and watch them drift apart against the clashing backgrounds, then toggle the reveal to bring them together and confirm they match.
